data.name: Error.Unauthorized
data.value: Your session is invalid or has expired.

data.name: Error.Forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action.

data.name: Feature.Wallet
data.value: wallet

data.name: Feature.Qr
data.value: QR code

data.name: Error.UsernameTaken
data.value: This username already exists.

data.name: Error.InvalidCredentials
data.value: Incorrect username or password.

data.name: Error.AccountDisabled
data.value: This account has been disabled. Please contact an administrator.

data.name: Error.InternalError
data.value: A system error has occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: Error.InvalidRefreshToken
data.value: The refresh token is invalid or has expired.

data.name: Error.CurrentPasswordIncorrect
data.value: The current password is incorrect.

data.name: Error.DefaultCategoryNotDeletable
data.value: The default category cannot be deleted.

data.name: Error.CategoryNotFound
data.value: Category not found.

data.name: Error.CategoryNameDuplicate
data.value: A category with this name already exists.

data.name: Error.EventClosed
data.value: The event is closed and cannot be changed.

data.name: Error.EventClosedEdit
data.value: A closed event cannot be edited.

data.name: Error.EventClosedDelete
data.value: A closed event cannot be deleted.

data.name: Error.EventClosedDetach
data.value: An expense cannot be removed from a closed event.

data.name: Error.EventRangeExcludesAssignedExpenses
data.value: Cannot change the date range: an assigned expense falls outside the new range.

data.name: Error.EventNotFound
data.value: Event not found.

data.name: Error.ExpensePayerInvalid
data.value: The payer is invalid or has been deleted.

data.name: Error.ExpenseCategoryInvalid
data.value: The category is invalid or has been deleted.

data.name: Error.ExpenseTagInvalid
data.value: The tag is invalid or has been deleted.

data.name: Error.ShareMemberInvalid
data.value: The share's member is invalid or has been deleted.

data.name: Error.DuplicateShareMember
data.value: Each member may have only one share per expense.

data.name: Error.ExpenseTimeOutOfEventRange
data.value: The expense time is outside the event's date range.

data.name: Error.ExpenseNotFound
data.value: Expense not found.

data.name: Error.OwnerRepresentativeNotDeletable
data.value: The owner-representative member cannot be deleted.

data.name: Error.MemberNotFound
data.value: Member not found.

data.name: Error.OwnerRepresentativeShareNotDeletable
data.value: The owner-representative member's share cannot be deleted.

data.name: Error.OwnerRepresentativeShareMemberNotChangeable
data.value: The owner-representative member's share cannot be reassigned to another member.

data.name: Error.ShareNotFound
data.value: Share not found.

data.name: Error.MemberLimitReached
data.value: Free accounts can create at most {0} members. Upgrade to Premium to remove the limit.

data.name: Error.OpenEventLimitReached
data.value: Free accounts can have at most {0} open events. Close some events or upgrade to Premium to remove the limit.

data.name: Error.MonthlyExpenseLimitReached
data.value: Free accounts can create at most {0} expenses per month. Upgrade to Premium to remove the limit.

data.name: Error.PremiumFeatureRequired
data.value: The {0} feature is available only to Premium accounts. Upgrade to use it.

data.name: Error.EventNotClosedForQr
data.value: A QR code can be generated only for a closed event.

data.name: Error.NoOutstandingDebtForQr
data.value: No member has any outstanding debt in this event.

data.name: Error.BankAccountNotFound
data.value: Bank account not found.

data.name: Error.NoBankAccountForQr
data.value: There is no bank account available to generate a QR code.

data.name: Error.AdminCannotTargetSelf
data.value: You cannot perform this action on your own admin account.

data.name: Error.AdminCannotTargetAdmin
data.value: You cannot disable or demote another admin account, or this action would leave the system with no administrators.

data.name: Error.AdminUserNotFound
data.value: User not found.

data.name: Error.UnsupportedExportFormat
data.value: The requested export format is not supported.

data.name: Error.TagNotFound
data.value: Tag not found.

data.name: Error.TagNameDuplicate
data.value: A tag with this name already exists.

data.name: Envelope.ValidationFailed
data.value: The submitted data is invalid.

data.name: Envelope.FieldInvalid
data.value: Invalid value.

data.name: Envelope.InternalError
data.value: A system error has occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: Serialization.DateTimeMustBeString
data.value: The date-time value must be an ISO-8601 string.

data.name: Serialization.DateTimeInvalid
data.value: The date-time value is invalid.

data.name: Serialization.DateTimeInvalidWithValue
data.value: The date-time value is invalid: {0}

data.name: Success.AdminAccountDisabled
data.value: The account has been disabled.

data.name: Success.AdminAccountEnabled
data.value: The account has been re-enabled.

data.name: Success.AdminTokensRevoked
data.value: All of the user's sessions have been revoked.

data.name: Success.AdminRoleUpdated
data.value: The user's role has been updated.

data.name: Success.LoggedOut
data.value: Signed out successfully.

data.name: Success.PasswordChanged
data.value: Password changed successfully. Please sign in again on all devices.

data.name: Success.BankAccountSetDefault
data.value: The default bank account has been set.

data.name: Success.BankAccountDeleted
data.value: The bank account has been deleted.

data.name: Success.CategorySetDefault
data.value: The default category has been set.

data.name: Success.CategoryDeleted
data.value: The category has been deleted.

data.name: Success.EventDeleted
data.value: The event has been deleted.

data.name: Success.EventClosed
data.value: The event has been closed.

data.name: Success.ExpenseDeleted
data.value: The expense has been deleted.

data.name: Success.ExpenseSettledUpdated
data.value: The settled status has been updated.

data.name: Success.ExpenseDetached
data.value: The expense has been removed from the event.

data.name: Success.ShareDeleted
data.value: The share has been deleted.

data.name: Success.HealthOk
data.value: The system is operating normally.

data.name: Success.MemberDeleted
data.value: The member has been deleted.

data.name: Success.TagDeleted
data.value: The tag has been deleted.

data.name: Validation.Auth.CurrentPasswordRequired
data.value: Current password must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Auth.NewPasswordRequired
data.value: New password must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Auth.NewPasswordTooShort
data.value: New password must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Auth.NewPasswordTooLong
data.value: New password must not exceed {0} bytes.

data.name: Validation.Auth.UsernameRequired
data.value: Username must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Auth.PasswordRequired
data.value: Password must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Auth.RefreshTokenRequired
data.value: Refresh token must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Auth.UsernameLength
data.value: Username must be between {0} and {1} characters.

data.name: Validation.Auth.UsernamePattern
data.value: Username may contain only unaccented letters, digits, and the characters _ . -

data.name: Validation.Auth.PasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Auth.PasswordTooLong
data.value: Password must not exceed {0} bytes.

data.name: Validation.Member.NameRequired
data.value: Member name must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Member.NameTooLong
data.value: Member name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Category.NameRequired
data.value: Category name must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Category.NameTooLong
data.value: Category name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Category.ColorRequired
data.value: Category color must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Category.ColorInvalid
data.value: The category color is invalid.

data.name: Validation.Category.IconTooLong
data.value: The category icon must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Tag.NameRequired
data.value: Tag name must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Tag.NameTooLong
data.value: Tag name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Event.NameRequired
data.value: Event name must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Event.NameTooLong
data.value: Event name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Event.DescriptionTooLong
data.value: Event description must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Event.StartDateRequired
data.value: Start date must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Event.EndDateRequired
data.value: End date must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Event.EndDateBeforeStart
data.value: End date must be on or after the start date.

data.name: Validation.Expense.NameRequired
data.value: Expense name must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Expense.NameTooLong
data.value: Expense name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Expense.DescriptionTooLong
data.value: Description must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Expense.ExpenseTimeRequired
data.value: Expense time must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Expense.EventUuidRequired
data.value: Event UUID must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Share.MemberRequired
data.value: The share's member must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.BankAccount.BankBinRequired
data.value: Bank code (BIN) must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.BankAccount.BankBinPattern
data.value: Bank code (BIN) must be exactly 6 digits.

data.name: Validation.BankAccount.BankNameRequired
data.value: Bank name must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.BankAccount.BankNameTooLong
data.value: Bank name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.BankAccount.AccountNumberRequired
data.value: Account number must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.BankAccount.AccountNumberInvalid
data.value: The account number is invalid.

data.name: Validation.BankAccount.AccountHolderNameRequired
data.value: Account holder name must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.BankAccount.AccountHolderNameTooLong
data.value: Account holder name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Common.RangeInvalid
data.value: Invalid time range: the start must be on or before the end.

data.name: Validation.Common.AmountNegative
data.value: The amount must not be negative.

data.name: Validation.Common.NoteTooLong
data.value: The note must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Stats.ScopeConflict
data.value: Filter by event or by time range, but not both at once.

data.name: Validation.Admin.BucketInvalid
data.value: Invalid time bucket. Only day or month is accepted.

data.name: Validation.Admin.PageMin
data.value: Page number must be greater than or equal to 1.

data.name: Validation.Admin.PageSizeRange
data.value: Page size must be between 1 and {0}.

data.name: Validation.Admin.SortInvalid
data.value: Invalid sort field. Only createdAt, username, tier, or status is accepted.

data.name: Validation.Admin.DirectionInvalid
data.value: Invalid sort direction. Only asc or desc is accepted.

data.name: Validation.Admin.CurrencyTooLong
data.value: Currency must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Admin.ReferenceTooLong
data.value: Reference must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.Admin.RoleRequired
data.value: Role must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.Admin.RoleInvalid
data.value: Invalid role. Only USER or ADMIN is accepted.
